title: Opportunities endpoint
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/opportunities: returns approved signals from existing opportunities pipeline
Query params: symbol, agent, status, since, until, limit
Free tier: returns empty or minimal data (upsell signal)
Response format matches spec exactly (id, agent_name, symbol, signal, confidence, reasoning, suggested_trade, status, created_at, expires_at)
Rate limit check before returning data
